unit: Ὅ6 Unit 6: Systems of Linear Equations and Inequalities

questions.question: A recipe for making cookies requires $2x$ cups of flour and $3x$ cups of sugar. If a baker has $12$ cups of flour and $15$ cups of sugar, how many batches of cookies can be made?
A construction site requires $x$ hours to complete the foundation and $2x$ hours to build the frame. If the total time available is $18$ hours, what is the maximum value of $x$?
A chef is making a sauce that requires $x$ cups of tomato puree and $x + 2$ cups of water. If the total amount of liquid is $12$ cups, what is the value of $x$?

A builder is constructing a house with a rectangular base. The length of the base is $x$ meters, and the width is $x - 2$ meters. If the area of the base is $24$ square meters, what is the value of $x$?
A recipe for making bread requires $x$ cups of flour and $x - 1$ cups of yeast. If a baker has $15$ cups of flour and $10$ cups of yeast, how many batches of bread can be made?
A construction crew can build $x$ meters of fence in one day. If they work for $5$ days, they can build $x + 10$ meters of fence. How many meters of fence can they build in one day?
A chef is making a dish that requires $x$ cups of oil and $2x$ cups of vinegar. If the total amount of liquid is $18$ cups, what is the value of $x$?
A builder is constructing a bridge with a length of $x$ meters and a width of $x - 3$ meters. If the area of the bridge is $30$ square meters, what is the value of $x$?

A bakery is making a special cake that requires $x$ cups of flour and $y$ cups of sugar. The baker has $20$ cups of flour and $15$ cups of sugar. Write a system of equations to represent the situation and solve for $x$ and $y$ if the cake requires $2x + 3y = 45$ and $x + 2y = 20$. Show your work and explain your answer.

A construction company is building a new skyscraper with $x$ floors and $y$ elevators. The company has a budget of $$10$ million and each floor costs $$0.5$ million to build, while each elevator costs $$1$ million. Write a system of equations to represent the situation and solve for $x$ and $y$ if the company has $2x + 5y = 50$ and $x - 2y = -10$. Show your work and explain your answer.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering
Show all work and explain answers for free response questions
Use a calculator only when necessary
